name: Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into a jar.
2. Add garlic and cover the mixture.
3. Let stand for at least an hour.
4. Tear lettuce into large pieces and add to a bowl.
5. Sprinkle cheese, salt, dry mustard, and pepper over the greens.
6. Combine remaining ingredients (anchovy fillets, croutons, lemon juice) with the greens.
7. Toss lightly until well mixed.
